no: FAILED on BG2EE/EET: COPY_EXISTING ~AR0400.wed~ fails because BG2:EE has ZERO AR-prefixed WED files in chitin.key or BIFs. Area WED files don't exist as standalone indexed resources on the EE engine. This is a fundamental EE incompatibility in the mod, not an EET-specific issue. The mod would also fail on vanilla BG2:EE. Author: Lava Del'Vortel. Needs to be updated to not require COPY_EXISTING on .wed files, or to generate/patch them differently.
sum: Adds a new section of Athkatlan sewers with three areas to explore, mini-quests, new items, and unique graphics.

co.n: Athkatlan Grounds: The Ooze's Lounge - a new area under Athkatlan Slums
co.tp2n: Athkatlan Grounds: The Ooze's Lounge - a new area under Athkatlan Slums
co.no: EXCLUDED: COPY_EXISTING ~AR0400.wed~ fails — BG2:EE engine does not store area WED files as indexed resources. Zero AR-prefixed WEDs exist in vanilla chitin.key.
